permissions.fallback_msg: seo-review needs to read concept page files (e.g., .mdx frontmatter, headings, body content) from the local workspace to perform the audit. Allow this read?
seo-review needs to read version-controlled source files (MDX concept pages, docs.json navigation config) to inspect slug names, heading structure, and internal links. Allow this read?
seo-review needs to run shell commands (e.g., grep -r to search for internal links and orphan-page detection) as described in the audit methodology. Allow shell execution?
seo-review may write the completed SEO audit report document to the local workspace. Allow this file write?
